summary:
There is no evidence that prehospital transdermal glyceryl trinitrate was evaluated or found effective in stroke based on the RIGHT-2 trial, as the trial itself is unmentioned in available resources. Glyceryl trinitrate is contra-indicated in stroke due to risk of hemorrhage and has no established role in acute cerebrovascular events.  

\boxed{B}

\boxed{B}. Answer choice: B
